moments.title: England in World Cup Quarter-Final
moments.blurb: England faces Norway in a highly anticipated FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-final match tonight.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: It's Quarter-Final day! England take on Norway in the FIFA World Cup 2026 tonight. Are you ready? #FIFAWorldCup

angles.name: Team Spirit
angles.copy: The Lionesses are geared up for their World Cup Quarter-Final against Norway. Send your good luck messages! 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿 #WorldCup2026

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The penultimate day of the Wimbledon Championships 2026 is today, leading into the highly anticipated men's and women's singles finals this weekend.

angles.name: Today's Action
angles.copy: Centre Court is buzzing! It's the penultimate day of Wimbledon 2026. Who are you backing for the finals? 🎾

angles.name: Finals Anticipation
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! The Wimbledon 2026 finals weekend is here. Who will lift the trophies?

moments.title: 'Rein Me In' makes chart history
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' has made Official Singles Chart history, becoming the longest-running Number 1 single by a British act with 16 non-consecutive weeks at the top.

angles.name: Chart Record
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is now the longest-running British No.1 single ever with 16 weeks! What a track!

angles.name: Long Reign
angles.copy: Still at the top! 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean marks its 16th week at Number 1. Are you still loving it?

moments.title: Bristol Pride Day
moments.blurb: Bristol Pride culminates today with a vibrant parade and outdoor celebration, promoting love and equality for the LGBTQIA+ community.

angles.name: Pride Parade
angles.copy: Happy Bristol Pride Day! The city is celebrating with a colourful parade and festivities for the LGBTQIA+ community. 🎉

angles.name: Weekend Vibe
angles.copy: Soaking up the positive vibes at Bristol Pride today. What an amazing celebration of love and diversity! #Pride2026

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival
moments.blurb: Alexandra Palace Park in London hosts the Kaleidoscope Festival today, featuring a diverse lineup of music and arts.

angles.name: Festival Day
angles.copy: Who's at Kaleidoscope Festival in Alexandra Palace Park today? What an incredible lineup for a Saturday! 🎶

angles.name: London Gigs
angles.copy: If you're in London, Kaleidoscope Festival is happening today at Ally Pally! Enjoy the music and sunshine! #LondonGigs

moments.title: Llangollen Eisteddfod Finale
moments.blurb: The Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod concludes tomorrow, celebrating music and culture with competitors from around the world.

angles.name: Welsh Culture
angles.copy: It's the final day of the Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod tomorrow! A fantastic celebration of Welsh and global culture. #Llangollen

angles.name: International Music
angles.copy: Bringing the world to North Wales! The Llangollen Eisteddfod wraps up tomorrow after a week of incredible international music and dance. #Eisteddfod

moments.title: Yusuf Islam (Cat Stevens) turns 78
moments.blurb: Legendary British singer-songwriter Yusuf Islam, known as Cat Stevens, celebrates his 78th birthday on July 21.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the iconic Yusuf Islam, also known as Cat Stevens! What's your favourite song from the legend? #CatStevens #YusufIslam

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating 78 years of timeless music! Happy Birthday to the incredible Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam). #Legend

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! The Queen legend continues to inspire generations of guitarists. #BrianMay #Queen

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to Queen's magnificent guitarist, Brian May, turning 79 on July 19! What's your favourite Queen riff? #RockMusic

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Guitar icon Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20.

angles.name: Birthday Groove
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Carlos Santana! Get your groove on with some classic Santana tunes today. #CarlosSantana

angles.name: Guitar Master
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the incomparable Carlos Santana! A true master of the guitar. #GuitarGod

moments.title: Tom Fletcher turns 41
moments.blurb: McFly frontman and popular author Tom Fletcher celebrates his 41st birthday on July 17.

angles.name: McFly Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to McFly's very own Tom Fletcher! Still rocking and writing amazing books. #TomFletcher #McFly

angles.name: Celebration
angles.copy: Sending birthday love to Tom Fletcher, who turns 41 on July 17! What's your favourite McFly song? #HappyBirthdayTom

moments.title: Stewart Copeland turns 74
moments.blurb: The Police drummer and rock legend Stewart Copeland celebrates his 74th birthday on July 16.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the incredible Stewart Copeland of The Police! Still one of the most distinctive drummers in rock. #StewartCopeland

angles.name: Iconic Beat
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 74th Birthday to Stewart Copeland on July 16! Those Police beats are still legendary. #Drummer

moments.title: Olly Alexander turns 36
moments.blurb: Years & Years frontman and Eurovision star Olly Alexander celebrates his 36th birthday on July 15.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 36th Birthday to the brilliant Olly Alexander of Years & Years! Hope it's a fantastic day for our Eurovision king. #OllyAlexander

angles.name: Eurovision Favourite
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to Olly Alexander, turning 36 on July 15! Still obsessed with his Eurovision performance. #PopMusic

moments.title: Roger McGuinn turns 84
moments.blurb: The Byrds co-founder and folk-rock pioneer Roger McGuinn celebrates his 84th birthday on July 13.

angles.name: Folk-Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the legendary Roger McGuinn of The Byrds! Still sounds incredible. #RogerMcGuinn #TheByrds

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 84th Birthday to Roger McGuinn on July 13! His music with The Byrds is timeless. #MusicLegend

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Days Begin
moments.blurb: The Open Championship 2026 officially begins its practice days at Royal Birkdale Golf Club tomorrow, ahead of the tournament proper later next week.

angles.name: Golf Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready, golf fans! Practice days for The Open Championship begin tomorrow at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug? #TheOpen

angles.name: Road to Birkdale
angles.copy: The world's best golfers are heading to Royal Birkdale! Practice for The Open 2026 starts tomorrow. #RoyalBirkdale

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final
moments.blurb: The final of the ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026 takes place tomorrow, concluding the tournament hosted across England.

angles.name: Cricket Final
angles.copy: It's the ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final tomorrow! Who are you hoping to see lift the trophy? #T20WorldCup

angles.name: Home Tournament
angles.copy: After a fantastic tournament across England, the ICC Women's T20 World Cup culminates in the final tomorrow! #Cricket
